CoverLetterForge.name: Cover Letter Forge
CoverLetterForge.tagline: AI Cover Letter Generator that beats ATS filters in 5 seconds.
CoverLetterForge.short_description: Stop manual writing. Cover Letter Forge uses DeepSeek V3 to craft tailored cover letters that match your resume to the job description perfectly.

ResumeAI.name: ATS Resume Optimizer
ResumeAI.tagline: Scan and optimize your resume for a 95%+ ATS match score.
ResumeAI.short_description: The only resume tool that simulates real recruiter ATS algorithms. Upload your resume, get a score, and let AI rewrite your bullet points for keywords.

ScamDetector.name: AI Debt Scam Shield
ScamDetector.tagline: Protect yourself from predatory debt settlement contracts.
ScamDetector.short_description: Paste your contract or debt offer. Our AI identifies legal red flags and 'too good to be true' clauses used by debt scam companies.

CRMExtract.name: AI CRM Extract
CRMExtract.tagline: Turn messy meeting notes into structured CRM data instantly.
CRMExtract.short_description: Automatically extract contacts, deal values, and next steps from raw notes. Ready for export to Salesforce, HubSpot, and Pipedrive.

PitchDeckAI.name: AI Pitch Deck Generator
PitchDeckAI.tagline: Go from idea to investor-ready 10-slide deck in seconds.
PitchDeckAI.short_description: Describe your startup idea and get a professional pitch deck complete with financial strategy, market analysis, and speaker notes.
